chunks.title: Psalmist's Distress and Longing for Rest
chunks.reason: The psalmist opens with a prayer of complaint describing inner turmoil and a desire to escape to the wilderness.

chunks.title: Description of Enemies and Betrayal
chunks.reason: The speaker identifies the source of trouble as a close friend rather than a stranger, describing their deceitful nature.

chunks.title: Trust in God and Final Judgment
chunks.reason: The psalmist declares reliance on God for deliverance, contrasts the enemy's smooth speech with hidden malice, and concludes with a vow of trust.
